name: IdsWorkCompCaseCntBal

text.value: with base as (select bal.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, bal.SRC_SYS_CD, case.SRC_SYS_CD as TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, case.SUB_UNIQ_KEY as TRGT_SUB_UNIQ_KEY from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WorkCompOwner}.WORK_COMPNSTN_CASE case full outer join @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_WorkCompOwner}.B_WORK_COMPNSTN_CASE bal on case.SRC_SYS_CD = bal.SRC_SYS_CD and case.SUB_UNIQ_KEY = bal.SUB_UNIQ_KEY where case.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}), research as (select TRGT_SUB_UNIQ_KEY, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, SRC_SYS_CD from base where TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD is null or SRC_SYS_CD is null or SUB_UNIQ_KEY is null or TRGT_SUB_UNIQ_KEY is null), notification as (select top 1 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS WORK COMP CASE OUT OF TOLERANCE' as NOTIFICATION from base where @{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd} = 'OUT'); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XfrmLogic_Research_TMP_IdsWorkCompCaseCntBal; SELECT TRGT_SUB_UNIQ_KEY, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, SRC_SYS_CD INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XfrmLogic_Research_TMP_IdsWorkCompCaseCntBal FROM research; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XfrmLogic_Notify_TMP_IdsWorkCompCaseCntBal; SELECT NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.XfrmLogic_Notify_TMP_IdsWorkCompCaseCntBal FROM notification;
